title: Xert XSSR Interval
description: Xert Strain Score Rate intervals — variable power within work bouts
purpose: Variable-power VO2max intervals maintaining constant strain rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 70%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 70% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 70% for 10:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 70% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 70% for 10:00. Finish strong.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/15. Fresh legs lie to you — they say this is easy. By rep 3 you'll know the truth.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First interval: 1:00 at 115-115% FTP. Seated. Focus on pacing, not heroics.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 1/15. You're starting fresh. Set the standard for the rest of the workout.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/15. Your legs feel good. Enjoy it. By rep 3 they'll be filing a formal complaint.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Starting. 115% for 1:00. Controlled aggression. Lock in form early.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Set 1: 1:00 at 95%. Sweet spot? Nothing sweet. But it works. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/3. 95% at 90-95 rpm, Seated. Sustainable discomfort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Your body knows what to do at threshold. Trust your fitness. Block 1/3.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 1: 95% for 1:00. Like Groundhog Day, but with more lactic acid.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 1: 1:00 at 95%. Focus on efficient pedal stroke. 13 blocks remaining.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 3/15. You're 24% done. This is where average athletes quit. You're not average.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 3/15. Duration: 1:00. Power target unchanged, but cumulative stress is building.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 3/15. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 3/15. Only 12 more of these. 'Only.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: 24% complete. Rep 3/15. Fatigue is real — hold form. 118%, 90-95 rpm.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 26% complete. Block 1/3. This is where you prove you're serious.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 1: 1:00 at 92%. This is your lactate threshold — challenging but repeatable.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Block 1/3. 92% for 1:00. You can hold this. Trust your training.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 1/3. This is fine. Everything is fine. (Narrator: nothing was fine.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 1/3. 92% FTP, 90-95 rpm. Challenging but sustainable.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your lungs want to quit. Your mind wants to quit. But you won't. Rep 5 of 15.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 5/15. 10 to go. You've accumulated 4min of supra-threshold work. Stay sharp on form.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 5/15. You're building something real here. 10 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 5/15. Fun fact: this is the exact power output where regret lives.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 5/15. 120% FTP. Keep 90-95 rpm steady. Don't let form collapse.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/3. 55% FTP, Seated. 5:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 15 minutes of work done. 30 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 30% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% for 5:00. Finish strong.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 40% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: VO2max interval. Breathing should be gasping. After this: 0min 0s recovery before next effort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 40% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 40% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 40% done. 115% for 1:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 42% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 28 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 21 minutes in. 95% at 95-100 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 42% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 8 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 42% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 42% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 95%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 44% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Current: 118% FTP × 1:00. After rest, expect 92% for 1min. Plan accordingly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 44% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 44% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 44% done. 118% for 1:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 46% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 26 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 23 minutes in. 92% at 95-100 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 46% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 6 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 46% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 46% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 92%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 48% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: This one: 120% for 1:00. Next up: 5:00 recovery, then 1min at 115%.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 48% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 48% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 48% done. 120% for 1:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 50% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 55% × 5:00. Then 20min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 5:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 5:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. Power: 45-55%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is where you earn it. 4 more reps. Your legs are screaming. Good.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 11/15. 1:00 at 115%. Cadence: 85-90 rpm. Seated. 4 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 30 minutes of work done. 19 to go. You're right where you need to be.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 60% done. The good news: almost finished. The bad news: 4 intervals left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 11/15. 115% FTP × 1:00. Seated. 4 more to build fitness.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 3 blocks left. 18 minutes total. You wanted faster. This is how. Stop thinking, pedal.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 62% through session. Block 3/3. You've done 11min of threshold work.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 62% through. This effort builds mental toughness as much as physical fitness. Stay strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 62% done. This is sustainable. Technically. If you redefine 'sustainable.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 3/3. 18 minutes left. Maintain focus. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Deep into it now. 32 minutes of work behind you. Finish what you started.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 13: 118% FTP. You're 32 minutes in. Power should feel hard but repeatable. Adjust if fading.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Deep into it: 64% done. This is where you separate from your past self. Dig deeper.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 64% done. Your legs are questioning your life choices. Tell them to shut up.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 13/15. You've accumulated 12min of hard work. Quality over quantity from here.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 66% through. 92% at 85-90 rpm. Your legs are burning. Perfect. That's lactate threshold working.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 3/3. 66% complete. Hold 92% steady. 16 minutes remain.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 66% complete. Block 3/3. This is where mediocre riders crack. You're pushing through.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 33 minutes in. Your lactate threshold called. It's filing a complaint.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 33 minutes in. You're in the zone. Keep breathing rhythmic. Block 3/3.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 15/15. Everything you have left. Leave nothing for the cooldown.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 1:00 at 120%. Then 15min cooldown. Empty the tank correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This one is harder than the last. That's exactly how it should be. You're adapting. You're improving.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Same power as last time, but you're way more tired. Progressive overload! *cries in watts*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last rep. 120-120% FTP, 85-90 rpm, Seated. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 35 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 15min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 70% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 10 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 80% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 80% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 40 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 80% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% for 10:00. Finish strong.
